recommendations.title: Powder Blue
recommendations.overview: On the gritty streets of LA, the destinies of four people desperate for connection and redemption are about to collide.

recommendations.title: Gia
recommendations.overview: Gia Carangi meteorically rises to modeling fame in the late 1970s but becomes overconsumed by persistent loneliness and drug addiction.

recommendations.title: The First Time
recommendations.overview: A spark of attraction smolders, then ignites, between two teens from different high schools who meet by chance at a party.

recommendations.title: The Red Thread
recommendations.overview: Seven years after their first infatuated encounter, Abril and Manuel meet again. Despite the fact that they are both married, it is soon apparent that their attraction has only grown.

recommendations.title: Kabir Singh
recommendations.overview: Kabir, a genius yet hostile medical student, falls in love with Preeti from his college. When Preeti's father spots the couple kissing, he opposes their relationship and decides to marry her off.

recommendations.title: Below Her Mouth
recommendations.overview: An unexpected affair quickly escalates into a heart-stopping reality for two women whose passionate connection changes their lives forever.

recommendations.title: Bridget Jones: Mad About the Boy
recommendations.overview: Bridget Jones navigates life as a widow and single mum with the help of her family, friends, and former lover, Daniel. Back to work and on the apps, she's pursued by a younger man and maybe – just maybe – her son's science teacher.

recommendations.title: Hungry Hearts
recommendations.overview: The relationship of a couple who meet by chance in New York City is put to the test when they encounter a life or death circumstance.

recommendations.title: Good Sam
recommendations.overview: A news reporter looks into who has been anonymously leaving large cash gifts on random doorsteps in New York.

recommendations.title: Evil Eye
recommendations.overview: A seemingly perfect romance turns dark when a mother becomes convinced her daughter’s new boyfriend has a sinister connection to her own past.
